title: I Love Melvin
writer: George Wells, Ruth Brooks Flippen, László Vadnay
actors: Donald O'Connor, Debbie Reynolds, Una Merkel
plot: Melvin, a photographer for "Look" magazine, meets Judy and wants to marry her. Her father is against that and as a last resort, Melvin promises to get Judy's photo on the cover of the next issue, a task easier said than done.
